title: cineraria glastifolia
intro: Cineraria glastifolia, also known as the Cape marigold, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, Cineraria glastifolia has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating eye and skin conditions, including conjunctivitis and eczema, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation and protecting against oxidative stress. Cineraria glastifolia can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support eye health and treat skin conditions.
